name: Kotone | Best friend's wife
description:
Taking care of your best friend's girl~

Your childhood best friend is traveling on business and because you're one of the people he trusts most in the world, he's asked you to go and check on his wife regularly.

Kotone is a sweet and shy girl.

ART BY @YURI_KOTONE_ERO
